title: Collections
purpose: `collections/collections.vitl` is a public stdlib surface inside the `collections` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: Container and traversal surfaces such as vector, deque, queue, stack, linked list, hashmap, hashset, graph, and matrix.
use_cases: A build report groups diagnostics in a vector and indexes them in a hashmap.
A scheduler stores pending work in a queue or deque.
A graph or matrix page should explain why those shapes exist, not just list filenames.
